params.SpellDescription: Reveal the top card of target opponent's library. If it's a land, you gain 1 life. Then that player shuffles. Draw a card at the beginning of the next turn's upkeep.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Reveal the top card of target opponent's library. If it's a land, you gain 1 life. Then that player shuffles. Draw a card at the beginning of the next turn's upkeep.
